//4: This is the INNER DistributionConfig object passed via
//6: provision-cloudfront.sh renders a temp copy (substituting the __PLACEHOLDERS__
//7: below with sed) and feeds THAT rendered file to create-distribution. The `//*`
//8: keys are JSON comments; CloudFront ignores unknown top-level keys? NO — it does
//9: NOT. provision-cloudfront.sh STRIPS every key whose name starts with `//` before
//a: calling the API (jq 'del(..)'). Treat these `//` keys as documentation only.
//d: __OAC_ID__        -> Origin Access Control id (e.g. E2ABCDEFGHIJKL). Created or
//e: found by the script; SigV4 / signing-behavior=always / s3.
//f: __ACM_CERT_ARN__  -> ACM certificate ARN for cdn.databayt.org. MUST be a cert in
//g: us-east-1 (CloudFront only reads ACM from us-east-1).
//h: __CALLER_REF__    -> Idempotency token for create-distribution. The script sets a
//i: stable value so an accidental double-run is rejected by AWS
//j: rather than creating a duplicate distribution.
//m: - Origin is the S3 REST endpoint databayt-cdn.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com, NOT the
//n: website endpoint (*.s3-website-*). REST + OAC is required for a private bucket.
//o: - OriginAccessControlId wires the modern OAC. Legacy OriginAccessIdentity is left
//p: EMPTY ('') — we NEVER use the deprecated OAI.
//q: - S3OriginConfig.OriginAccessIdentity MUST be present-but-empty for an OAC origin.
//t: Origin/Access-Control-Request-* headers so S3 returns correct CORS).
//v: Access-Control-Allow-Origin to the edge response). Belt-and-suspenders with CORS-S3Origin.
//w: - DefaultRootObject is '' — this is an ASSET bucket, not a SPA; no index rewrite.

S3OriginConfig.//: Empty OriginAccessIdentity REQUIRED when using OAC. Never put an OAI here.

DefaultCacheBehavior.//cache: Managed 'CachingOptimized' — long TTLs, gzip/br compression respected.
DefaultCacheBehavior.//origin-req: Managed 'CORS-S3Origin' — forwards CORS request headers to S3.
DefaultCacheBehavior.//resp: Managed 'SimpleCORS' — adds Access-Control-Allow-Origin on the edge response.

Comment: databayt-cdn — asset CDN for cdn.databayt.org (S3 REST origin + OAC). Replaces dead d1dlwtcfl0db67.cloudfront.net.

ViewerCertificate.//: Custom ACM cert (NOT the default *.cloudfront.net cert). MUST be us-east-1.
